issue_summary: simplify DirectoryReader.indexExists; fix IndexWriter with CREATE to succeed on a corrupted index; add random IOExceptions to MockDirectoryWrapper.openInput/createOutput
javadoc_before: /** * Returns true if an index exists at the specified directory. * @param directory the directory to check for an index * @return true if an index exists; false otherwise */
javadoc_after: /** * Returns true if an index likely exists at * the specified directory. Note that if a corrupt index * exists, or if an index in the process of committing * @param directory the directory to check for an index * @return true if an index exists; false otherwise */
